reasoning: Emotional (60%): The apple reads as warm, friendly, and inviting — saturated reds and oranges with vivid green leaf accents nail the bright Hyrule mood. Round silhouette and toy-like proportions feel charming rather than realistic. No grim/dark tones; palette is cheerful and Zelda-appropriate. Score: 8/10. Technical (40%): Consistent 1px hard outlines visible at all zoom levels with no anti-aliasing bleed. Shading uses 2-3 hard tonal steps on the body (dark-red outline → mid-red → warm orange highlight) plus a small white specular dot for gloss — all pixel-grid snapped. Leaf detailing is clean with distinct pixel clusters. Compared to the Denzi armor reference, the craft level is comparable: disciplined palette, hard transitions, no sub-pixel blurring. Score: 8/10. Weighted: 0.6×8 + 0.4×8 = 8.0. Passes both emotional and technical axes.
